basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Rourkela has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years (relaxed for SC/ST/PWD/Female by 5 years, OBC by 3 years)
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable: 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.E./MS./M.Sc. Engg. (with GATE/NET qualification) or BE/B.Tech./B.Sc. Engg or equivalent (with GATE/NET qualification)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Tech./M.E./MS./M.Sc. Engg. (with GATE/NET qualification) in Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, Computer Science and Engineering, or similar, with specialization in Electronics, Communication, Signal Processing, AI/Machine Learning, Data Science, or related fields, with at least 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks in both BE/B.Tech/B.Sc. Engg and M.Tech./M.E./MS./M.Sc. Engg. BE/B.Tech./B.Sc. Engg or equivalent (with GATE/NET qualification) in Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, Computer Science and Engineering, or similar with CGPA of 7.0 or 65% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: INR 37,000/- per month (Year 1 & 2), INR 42,000/- per month (Year 3)
salary_details.details: Year 1 & 2: INR 37,000/- per month Year 3: INR 42,000/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project Online interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Rourkela is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at the National Institute of Technology Rourkela.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Tech./M.E./MS./M.Sc. Engg. or BE/B.Tech./B.Sc. Engg. with GATE/NET qualification in relevant fields, as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years, with relaxations provided for SC/ST/PWD/Female and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is INR 37,000/- per month for the first two years and INR 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email with all required documents as a single PDF file to the specified email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section, where a download link for the PDF is provided.
